candidate.title: AWS Trainium2 Trn2 aggregate-memory catalog promotion

local_checks.raw_manifest_scan: Existing local AWS Trn2 captures found and reused, including raw/crawler/compute-accelerators-aws-trn2/20260627T153315637188Z-aws-amazon-com-ec2-instance-types-trn2-9d15dc4a0c.md. No new external fetch was needed.
local_checks.wiki_search: Existing curated comparison and network/storage pages listed AWS Trainium2 Trn2 and UltraServer as aggregate cloud-offering comparison evidence. The structured resolved row for aws-trainium2-trn2-offering contained cloud_accelerator_count=16 only; aggregate_memory was schema-supported but unresolved before this parent task.
local_checks.domain_index_scan: ai_infra wiki/index.md routes this work to Compute Accelerator Spec Catalog, Compute Accelerator Parameter Comparison, and AI Infra Coverage Map. No new standalone AWS Trn2 wiki page was needed.
local_checks.prior_manifest_scan: Prior parent/r10 manifests mention AWS Trn2 as EFA/cloud-offering boundary evidence or as a non-edited aggregate row. Parent-1 through parent-16 promoted Corigine, SGLang supplements, Yusur, H200, Kubernetes/Kueue/Volcano, AWS/Lambda case-study/dashboard evidence, Resnics N2025, NVIDIA confidential inference, Asterfusion, Kunlunxin R200/R200-8F, Iluvatar Tiangai, MetaX C-series/C600, Huawei Atlas 300I A2, JaguarMicro Yunxiao DPU, and July 8 SGLang page-level operations, not AWS Trn2 aggregate memory.

duplicate_boundary_checks.result: aggregate_memory already exists as a cloud_offering role-specific field with GB canonical unit and applies_to including ai_asic; no schema change was needed.
The existing aws-trainium2-trn2-offering SKU row was reused; no UltraServer SKU row was added.

Before parent-17, the AWS Trn2 row had obs-aws-trn2-accelerator-count only. Added obs-aws-trn2-aggregate-memory for the source-stated 1.5 TB accelerator memory on trn2.48xlarge and trn2u.48xlarge, converted to 1536 GB.
Before parent-17, aws-trainium2-trn2-offering resolved only cloud_accelerator_count=16. Added aggregate_memory=1536 GB pointing to obs-aws-trn2-aggregate-memory.

The comparison page now identifies 1536 GB as the resolved Trn2 instance aggregate memory while keeping UltraServer memory, aggregate compute, total memory bandwidth, and EFAv3 as comparison-only boundary evidence.
The catalog page now records parent-17 as an incremental cloud-offering aggregate-memory promotion on the existing Trn2 row.
Hardware coverage and known_sources record parent-17 without mutating unrelated blocked gaps, SGLang parent-16 evidence, or non-hardware layers.

gap_reason: The local corpus already contained an official AWS Trn2 instance page with a source-visible product-details table for trn2.48xlarge and trn2u.48xlarge. The catalog had already represented the same cloud offering with 16 Trainium2 chips but had not promoted the source-visible 1.5 TB accelerator memory. The safe catalog boundary is aggregate_memory=1536 GB on the existing Trn2 cloud-offering row.

schema_boundary.source_value: Product details table states trn2.48xlarge and trn2u.48xlarge have 16 Trainium2 chips and 1.5 TB accelerator memory.
schema_boundary.boundary: The catalog resolves only the existing cloud-offering count and aggregate_memory field; 1.5 TB is recorded as 1536 GB.

schema_boundary.source_value: The page states Trn2 UltraServers have 64 Trainium2 chips, 6 TB high bandwidth memory, 83.2 FP8 PFLOPS, 185 TBps total memory bandwidth, and 12.8 Tbps EFAv3.
schema_boundary.boundary: No UltraServer structured row was added in parent-17. UltraServer values remain raw comparison and boundary evidence because the existing SKU row is the Trn2 instance offering and the planner's safe primary promotion is the 16-chip instance aggregate memory.

schema_boundary.source_value: The page also states aggregate FP8 performance, total memory bandwidth, EFAv3 bandwidth, local NVMe storage, vCPU count, host memory, price-performance, energy-efficiency, model counts, service integrations, availability, and customer testimonials.
schema_boundary.boundary: No aggregate compute, memory_bandwidth, network_bandwidth, storage, host, cost, energy, model-count, service-integration, availability, testimonial, benchmark, production-operation, SLO, training-throughput, or inference-throughput field was promoted.

non_promoted_boundaries: No Trn2 UltraServer structured row was added.
No UltraServer 6 TB memory, 64 Trainium2 chips, 83.2 FP8 PFLOPS, 185 TBps memory bandwidth, 12.8 Tbps EFAv3, NeuronLink, or availability wording was promoted as a resolved catalog field.
No aggregate FP8 PFLOPS was promoted into fp8_tflops, no total memory bandwidth was promoted into memory_bandwidth, and no EFAv3 bandwidth was promoted into network_bandwidth.

No local NVMe storage, EBS bandwidth, vCPU count, host memory, price-performance, energy-efficiency, model count, testimonial, service-integration, benchmark, production-operation, service-SLO, training-throughput, or inference-throughput claim was promoted.
No new external source was fetched, and no crawler subscriptions or Domain Channels were changed.
